query:
SELECT id, projectId, projectName, gfaResidential, gfaRetail, gfaOffices, estimatedBua, residentialSalePrice, retailSalePrice, officesSalePrice, numberOfUnits, saleableResidentialPct, saleableRetailPct, saleableOfficesPct
FROM feasibilityStudies WHERE projectId = 4;
